'''Ris Waller''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a member of the same [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Waller worked with [[Agent/Legends|Rebel agent]] [[Jan Ors]], [[Rosco Ross]] and [[A-Cee]] on the [[Cruiser/Legends|luxury liner]] ''[[Star of Empire]]''. There they recruited an [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] named [[Kyle Katarn]] to join their cause.

==Biography==
Rosco, A-Cee and Waller belonged to the same Rebel cell under Jan Ors. They secretly operated in an off-limits storage room onboard the ''[[Star of Empire]]''.

Onboard, Ors spotted an Imperial officer whom she already encountered on [[AX-456]] (where, inexplicably, he spared her and the other Rebels), and they improvised a plan to capture him. Katarn noticed Ors and started to chase her in the crowd. The chase followed on a moving walkway where Waller also was, with a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] in his right ear; seeing Ors running towards their hideout, he notified Rosco that they are on the way, and he also followed them.

Indeed, soon after Rosco had immobilised Katarn, Waller also showed up. He watched as Katarn had a brief brawl with Rosco, and Waller had his [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] in hand, until he was ordered by Ors to hide it, owing her life to Katarn.

Their operations were noticed by a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and Katarn warned Ors that the Imperials knew about them and would soon come. Ors ordered them to go to the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] deck and prepare the ''[[Truly Sorry]]''. Waller manned the overhead [[Turret/Legends|turret]] while Rosco guarded outside, waiting for Ors and [[A-Cee]], and was surprised to see Katarn boarding the ship and initialise the systems; Waller dropped out, Kyle responded with thumbs-up, and returned to his post.

During their [[Skirmish on the Star of Empire|episodic escape from the cruiser]], Katarn had Waller to shoot at a [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], shearing part of its starboard wing, in order to force the Hangar Control to open the [[Pressure door/Legends|pressure doors]]. Soon Jan entered the hangar, pursued by [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial military]] personnel. They exchanged fire with Rosco and Waller supported them, felling four of her pursuers, and scattering the rest. Rosco and Jan managed to board the ship and soon Waller warned them that [[Dol Donar's yacht|one ship]] was following them, and gaining while they calculated their coordinates.

Out of a coincidence, the pursuing ship was destroyed because of an internal explosion – A-Cee was on board and his self-destruct mechanism was activated – they safely made it to the ''[[New Hope]]''.

==Personality and traits==
Waller was a very tall and thin man, contrasting the burly and strong build of his partner, Rosco.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire'' audio drama]]
